subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

output.reason: Engineer u_7732 meets role requirements (POL-401) but deployment is outside approved maintenance window (current time Tuesday 02:15 UTC vs. approved window Saturday 10 PM – Sunday 6 AM UTC). CAB approval is required per POL-402 for out-of-window production deployments.

must reschedule to approved maintenance window or obtain emergency change advisory board authorization
